title: RevertRaidChanges-Normal
description: Restored Raid to the logic before version 1.21.
body:
## Description
### Restored the Raid logic to the state before version 1.21. 
- **Removed the 30-second cooldown for Raid.**
- **This does not include the restoration of the Bad Omen acquisition mechanism.**

When used with [RevertRaidChanges-Extra-BadOmen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revertraidchanges-extra-badomen) to restore the Bad Omen acquisition mechanism, it allows most non-professional Raid Farms to function.

Compared to the professional version, this version has lower performance overhead and fewer bugs.

For making professional Raid Farms usable, refer to [RevertRaidChanges-Pro](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revertraidchanges-pro).
